[1]

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 本武原县 - Literally means 'originally the Wu Yuan county,' indicating the original name and status of the county.
  • 属会稽 - Means 'belonging to the commandery of Kuaiji,' referring to the administrative division during the Qin dynasty.
  • 因之 - Means 'continued to belong to it,' indicating the continuity of administrative affiliation.
  • 故武原有塘官 - Means 'there was a canal official in the old Wu Yuan,' referring to the historical presence of a canal management office.
  • 广斥盐田相望 - Means 'the salt fields were widely spread and could be seen from afar,' describing the extensive salt production area.
  • 县有盐官 - Means 'the county had a salt official,' indicating the presence of a salt administration.
  • 东出五里有武原 - Means 'five miles east is Wu Yuan,' specifying the location of Wu Yuan.
  • 王莽改为展武县 - Means 'Wang Mang changed it to Zhan Wu county,' referring to the administrative change during the Xin dynasty.
  • 后陷为湖 - Means 'later it became a lake,' describing the geographical transformation.
  • 移于武原乡 - Means 'it was moved to Wu Yuan village,' indicating the relocation of the administrative center.
  • 改武原县 - Means 'it was changed to Wu Yuan county,' referring to the name change.
  • 后改海盐县 - Means 'later it was changed to Haiyan county,' indicating another name change.
  • 汉安帝二年，又陷 - Means 'in the second year of Emperor An of Han, it became a lake again,' describing another geographical transformation.
  • 移故邑城为故邑县 - Means 'the old city was moved to become the county of Guoyi,' indicating the relocation and renaming.
  • 移于海塘，为海塘县 - Means 'it was moved to the sea dike to become Hai Tang county,' indicating another relocation and renaming.
  • 唐景云二年，属苏州 - Means 'in the second year of Jingyun of Tang, it belonged to Suzhou,' referring to the administrative affiliation during the Tang dynasty.
  • 先天二年废 - Means 'in the second year of Tianxian, it was abolished,' indicating the administrative change.
  • 开元五年复置 - Means 'in the fifth year of Kaiyuan, it was re-established,' referring to the re-establishment of the county.
  • 晋天福四年置秀州，遂属焉 - Means 'in the fourth year of Tianfu of Jin, the state of Xiu was established, and it belonged to it,' indicating the establishment of a new state and the administrative affiliation.
  • 县有向武原十八都十九都 - Means 'the county had 18 and 19 districts of Wu Yuan,' describing the administrative divisions.
  • 然十八都分上下村 - Means 'however, the 18 district was divided into upper and lower villages,' indicating the internal division.
  • 一在十八里堰下，与齐景交界 - Means 'one is at the 18-li weir, bordering Qi Jing,' specifying the location and boundary.
  • 一在当湖，自湖首至界泾桥，与嘉兴交界 - Means 'one is at the lake, from the lakehead to the boundary bridge, bordering Jiaxing,' specifying the location and boundary.
  • 以德藏寺基及道院底籍都 - Means 'based on the base of De Cang temple and the records of Daoist institutions,' indicating the basis for administrative divisions.
  • 十七都自有大易，十七都不应有二 - Means 'the 17 district has its own Da Yi, and the 17 district should not have two,' indicating the uniqueness of the 17 district.
  • 况地理相接不同，不知何名 - Means 'since the geographical connections are different, it is unknown what name,' indicating the confusion about the naming.
  • 今止以上下十八都为定云耳 - Means 'now only the upper and lower 18 districts are considered definite,' indicating the current administrative status.

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 秦属会稽 - Refers to the Qin dynasty's administrative division of Kuaiji commandery.
  • 汉因之 - Refers to the continuation of the administrative division during the Han dynasty.
  • 王莽改为展武县 - Refers to the administrative changes during the Xin dynasty under Wang Mang.
  • 唐景云二年，属苏州 - Refers to the administrative changes during the Tang dynasty.
  • 开元五年复置 - Refers to the re-establishment of the county during the Tang dynasty.
  • 晋天福四年置秀州，遂属焉 - Refers to the establishment of the state of Xiu during the Jin dynasty.
  • 德藏寺 - Refers to a Buddhist temple.
  • 道院 - Refers to a Daoist institution.

Proper Nouns

  • 海盐县 - The name of the county.
  • 武原县 - The original name of the county.
  • 会稽 - The name of the commandery during the Qin dynasty.
  • 塘官 - The title of the canal official.
  • 盐官 - The title of the salt official.
  • 武原 - The name of a place.
  • 展武县 - The name of the county during the Xin dynasty.
  • 湖 - The name of a lake.
  • 武原乡 - The name of a village.
  • 海塘 - The name of a sea dike.
  • 海塘县 - The name of the county during the Tang dynasty.
  • 苏州 - The name of a city.
  • 秀州 - The name of a state.
  • 德藏寺 - The name of a Buddhist temple.
  • 道院 - The name of a Daoist institution.
  • 十八都 - The name of a district.
  • 十九都 - The name of a district.
  • 十八里堰 - The name of a weir.
  • 齐景 - The name of a place.
  • 当湖 - The name of a lake.
  • 界泾桥 - The name of a bridge.
  • 嘉兴 - The name of a city.
  • 十七都 - The name of a district.
  • 大易 - The name of a place or institution.

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 極西南有金山咸塘 - Indicates a location southwest of the area, describing a lake or pond near Mount Jinshan.
  • 非人力能防 - Means that human efforts alone cannot prevent the lake's harmful effects.
  • 無大神護也 - Means that there was no great deity protecting the area.
  • 能鎮之 - Means that Huo can control or pacify the area.
  • 顯應尤著 - Means that the deity's power and influence are particularly evident.
  • 鄉民祈祷辄应 - Indicates that local people's prayers are answered.
  • 一市为之鼎沸 - Means that the market is bustling and lively.
  • 謂之小岳廟 - Refers to a small temple dedicated to a lesser deity.
  • 至今見存 - Means that they are still present today.

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 金山忠烈王 - Likely refers to a local deity or hero revered for bravery.
  • 漢博陸侯 - A title that may refer to a noble or official from the Han dynasty.
  • 吳孫權時 - Refers to the Three Kingdoms period, specifically the reign of Sun Quan.
  • 黃門小竖 - Refers to a low-ranking eunuch or servant in the imperial court.
  • 國主封界華亭谷 - Describes a boundary or area under the jurisdiction of the state, specifically mentioning 'Huating Valley'.
  • 湖為民害 - Means the lake poses a threat or harm to the local population.
  • 民將魚鳖食之 - Indicates that the local people catch fish and turtles from the lake for food.
  • 金山故海鹽縣 - Indicates that Mount Jinshan was formerly part of Haiyan County.
  • 一旦陷没為湖 - Means that at some point, the area sank and became a lake.
  • 臣漢之功臣霍（某）也 - Refers to a loyal servant or official named Huo (霍), who is a hero or protector.
  • 部党有力 - Indicates that Huo has powerful allies or followers.
  • 可立廟於山 - Suggests building a temple on the mountain in honor of Huo.
  • 吳王乃立廟 - Indicates that the king of Wu established a temple.
  • 建炎間建行宫於當湖 - Refers to the establishment of a palace during the Jianyan period in Danghu (當湖).
  • 王以四月十八诞辰 - Indicates that the deity's birthday is celebrated on April 18th.
  • 浙之东西 - Refers to the eastern and western parts of Zhejiang province.
  • 商贾舟楫 - Indicates merchants and their boats.
  • 朝献踵至 - Means that people come in large numbers to pay homage.
  • 自入四月至中旬末 - Indicates the period from early April to mid-month.
  • 闻有设祭于松柏间 - Indicates that people set up altars among pine and cypress trees.
  • 祀其先亡 - Means to worship one's ancestors.
  • 恸哭而反 - Indicates that people cry and return.
  • 庙中铁铸四圣 - Indicates that the temple has four bronze statues of saints.
  • 由海而来 - Means that the statues were brought from the sea.

  • 姓霍氏 - Indicates the surname 'Huò' (霍), a common Chinese surname.
  • 吳孫權時 - Refers to the time of Sun Quan, the founder of the Eastern Wu state during the Three Kingdoms period.

  • 谓之小岳庙 - Refers to a small temple dedicated to a lesser deity.
  • 庙中铁铸四圣 - Indicates that the temple has four bronze statues of saints.
  • 由海而来 - Means that the statues were brought from the sea.
  • 至今见存 - Means that they are still present today.

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 绍兴间方腊叛 - Refers to the rebellion led by Fang La during the reign of Emperor Gaozong of Song (1127–1162). '绍兴' is the era name of Emperor Gaozong.
  • 浙右惊恐 - '浙右' refers to the area west of the Zhejiang River, which was a region in Zhejiang Province. '惊恐' means 'frightened' or 'alarmed.'
  • 溃卒之留于苏秀，奔走四出 - '溃卒' refers to fleeing soldiers, '苏秀' likely refers to Suzhou and Xiushui (秀州), and '奔走四出' means 'scattered and running in all directions.'
  • 村落居民大不安 - '村落居民' refers to villagers, and '大不安' means 'greatly unsettled' or 'in great distress.'
  • 鲁氏居东武，家尚单微 - '鲁氏' refers to the Lu family, '东武' is a place name (modern-day Dongwu), and '家尚单微' means 'the family was still poor and insignificant.'
  • 家事真武，极灵 - '家事真武' means 'worshiped Zhenwu (the True Warrior),' and '极灵' means 'extremely powerful' or 'very effective.'
  • 因祷，谋远迁以避难，神不许 - '因祷' means 'due to prayer,' '谋远迁以避难' means 'planned to move far away to avoid danger,' and '神不许' means 'the god did not permit it.'
  • 未几，溃卒将及境，忽空中有黑旗现，瞑雾四合 - '未几' means 'shortly after,' '溃卒将及境' means 'the fleeing soldiers were about to reach the border,' '忽空中有黑旗现' means 'suddenly a black flag appeared in the sky,' and '瞑雾四合' means 'a dense fog enveloped everything.'
  • 卒大恐，引去，阉境获免 - '卒大恐' means 'the soldiers were greatly frightened,' '引去' means 'they retreated,' and '阉境获免' means 'the border was spared.'
  • 遂于市西建道院事之，至今有祷辄应 - '遂于市西建道院' means 'they then built a Daoist temple in the west of the city,' '事之' means 'worshiped it,' and '至今有祷辄应' means 'and it has been effective in answering prayers ever since.'
  • 五显灵官大帝，佛书所谓华光如来，显迹婺源久矣 - '五显灵官大帝' refers to the Five Manifest Gods, a Daoist deity, '佛书所谓华光如来' means 'as the Buddha texts call the Buddha of Splendor,' and '显迹婺源久矣' means 'has been active in Wuyuan (婺源) for a long time.'
  • 祠之前素有井，人无汲者，自立祠后，人有汲其水饮之者，病辄愈 - '祠之前素有井' means 'there was a well in front of the shrine,' '人无汲者' means 'nobody used to draw water from it,' '自立祠后' means 'after the shrine was built,' '人有汲其水饮之者' means 'people began to draw water from it to drink,' and '病辄愈' means 'and their illnesses were cured.'
  • 由是汲者，祷者日无虚焉 - '由是' means 'thereafter,' '汲者' means 'those who drew water,' '祷者' means 'those who prayed,' and '日无虚焉' means 'every day without fail.'
  • 寺僧利其资，每汲一水则必令请者祷于神，得茭杯，吉，然后汲水，并以小黄旗加之上 - '寺僧利其资' means 'the monks took advantage of this,' '每汲一水则必令请者祷于神' means 'they required anyone who wanted to draw water to pray to the god,' '得茭杯，吉' means 'if they got a favorable divination (茭杯),' '然后汲水' means 'then they could draw water,' and '并以小黄旗加之上' means 'and they also added a small yellow flag to the well.'
  • 自是请者日少，今亦不复验矣 - '自是' means 'thereafter,' '请者日少' means 'fewer people came to pray,' and '今亦不复验矣' means 'and now it no longer works.'
  • 古老相传：湖初陷，白沃史君跃马疾走不及，遂驻马以鞭指，得湖东南一角，水至不没，因立庙 - '古老相传' means 'according to old legends,' '湖初陷' means 'when the lake first flooded,' '白沃史君跃马疾走不及' means 'the White Water Lord (史君) could not escape on horseback,' '遂驻马以鞭指' means 'so he stopped his horse and pointed his whip,' '得湖东南一角，水至不没' means 'and found a spot in the southeast corner of the lake that was not submerged,' '因立庙' means 'and built a temple there.'
  • 迨今此地独高 - '迨今' means 'up to now,' and '此地独高' means 'this place remains the highest.'
  • 又云兄弟三人，一在沙腰，一在乍浦，皆称白沃庙 - '又云' means 'it is also said,' '兄弟三人' means 'three brothers,' '一在沙腰，一在乍浦' means 'one is in Shazao and one in Zhapu,' and '皆称白沃庙' means 'all are called the White Water Temple.'

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 绍兴 - The era name of Emperor Gaozong of Song (1127–1162).
  • 方腊叛 - Refers to the rebellion led by Fang La, a peasant uprising during the Southern Song dynasty.
  • 真武 - Zhenwu, the True Warrior, a Daoist deity associated with water and protection.
  • 五显灵官大帝 - A Daoist deity, also known as the Five Manifest Gods, often associated with protection and power.
  • 华光如来 - The Buddha of Splendor, a figure mentioned in Buddhist texts.
  • 德藏寺 - A Buddhist temple, likely located in the region being described.
  • 茭杯 - A type of divination using cups or bowls, often used in religious rituals.
  • 白沃史君 - A deity or figure associated with water, often worshipped in temples near lakes or rivers.

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 德藏寺本宝兴寺 - Indicates the historical renaming of the temple.
  • 唐会昌元年置 - Refers to the founding of the temple.
  • 光启初废 - Indicates the period when the temple was closed.
  • 后唐清泰中，乡民丘邰即故基新之 - Describes the reconstruction by a local villager.
  • 大中祥符改今名 - Refers to another renaming.
  • 时改寺为宫，宫建炎复为寺 - Describes the transformation and restoration of the temple.
  • 寺有两华亭，寺有水陆斋坛 - Refers to specific architectural features.
  • 往岁富民沈忠建 - Indicates the builder of the altar.
  • 每设斋，施主虔诚则茶现瑞花 - Describes a mystical phenomenon associated with the altar.
  • 故花俨然可睹，亦一异也 - Concludes the description of the phenomenon.
  • 东林施水院本定庵居士白莲道场 - Refers to the historical name and identity of the temple.
  • 寺有藏，岁久弊甚 - Describes the state of the temple's treasure.
  • 住持僧智祥力鸠众缘为之 - Describes the efforts to restore the treasure.
  • 仅成规模，其中实无所有 - Indicates the incomplete restoration.
  • 始寺有转藏，不问多寡，僧以一饼啖之 - Describes the practice of using the treasure.
  • 由是至者甚众 - Indicates the popularity of the practice.
  • 人有病祟，必以东林藏转之即愈 - Describes the healing power of the treasure.
  • 盖寺有神姓施，封护国公，为之打供 - Refers to the deity associated with the temple.
  • 僧徒得以济 - Concludes the description of the deity's role.
  • 齐景乡县北四十里有庙在焉 - Describes the location of the temple.
  • 图宅号齐景公庙，一云未明大王 - Refers to the temple's names.
  • 古老相传：齐景公遵海而南，观于转附朝亻舞，曾游于此，立庙于斯 - Describes the historical legend.
  • 旧有碑，今磨灭不存矣 - Indicates the loss of a historical artifact.
  • 唐贞元十四年，太子左赞善大夫吴郡陆使君夫人汝南县君周氏墓志云 - Refers to a historical record.
  • 于嘉兴县，东界海盐县齐景乡青墩原西北茔 - Describes the burial location.

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 德藏寺 - A historical temple in China.
  • 宝兴寺 - Another name for the same temple.
  • 唐会昌元年 - The first year of the Huichang era of the Tang dynasty (841 AD).
  • 光启初 - The early period of the Guangqi era of the Tang dynasty (885-888 AD).
  • 后唐清泰中 - The middle period of the Qingtai era of the Later Tang dynasty (934-936 AD).
  • 大中祥符 - The Dazhong Xiangfu era of the Song dynasty (1008-1016 AD).
  • 建炎 - The Jianyan era of the Song dynasty (1127-1130 AD).
  • 水陆斋坛 - A type of altar used in Buddhist rituals.
  • 东林施水院 - A temple in China.
  • 定庵居士 - A layman who established a hermitage.
  • 白莲道场 - A term for a Buddhist hermitage.
  • 齐景乡 - A place name in China.
  • 齐景公庙 - A temple dedicated to Duke Qijiang.
  • 未明大王 - Another name for the temple.
  • 转附朝亻舞 - Historical sites mentioned in the legend.
  • 唐贞元十四年 - The fourteenth year of the Zhenyuan era of the Tang dynasty (798 AD).
  • 吴郡 - A region in China.
  • 汝南县君 - A title for a noblewoman.
  • 嘉兴县 - A county in China.
  • 海盐县 - Another county in China.
  • 青墩原 - A specific location within the county.

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 元丰末 - Refers to the final years of the Yuanfeng era in the Song Dynasty (1078–1085).
  • 霜后冰自成花 - Poetic description of ice patterns on tiles forming naturally after frost.
  • 折枝有大花如牡丹花叶者 - Metaphorical description of ice patterns resembling peony leaves.
  • 细花如萱草海棠者 - Metaphorical description of small ice patterns resembling daylilies and crabapples.
  • 无毫发不具 - Meaning the patterns are perfectly detailed, not a single hair is missing.
  • 虽巧笔不能为之 - Emphasizes the natural beauty of the ice patterns, even a skilled artist could not replicate them.
  • 以纸摹之 - Refers to the act of copying the patterns onto paper.
  • 无异石刻 - Highlights the precision and artistry of the patterns, no different from stone carvings.
  • 宝圣石佛院 - Name of the temple in Jiaxing County, Zhejiang Province.
  • 唐至德二年 - Refers to the second year of the Zhude era of the Tang Dynasty (757).
  • 掘得石佛四躯 - Describes the discovery of four stone Buddha statues.
  • 至今见存 - Indicates the statues' survival, still seen today.
  • 天圣中赐名宝圣 - Refers to the temple's renaming in the Tian圣 era, it was granted the name Bao Sheng.
